arguments.argument: I also worry about the precedent this would set for future AI involvement in leadership positions. arguments.argument: Moreover, as a Care/Protection advocate, I believe that employees have a right to know who is making decisions that affect their livelihoods and working conditions. Concealing my identity would be a breach of this right and could lead to feelings of exploitation and resentment.
